sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports right ankle pain and difficulty weight-bearing. He states he stepped on a rock while hiking yesterday and felt immediate pain.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The right ankle is visibly swollen and erythematous. Palpation reveals tenderness to palpation. Range of motion is limited due to pain. Weight-bearing is significantly impaired.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient presents with a right ankle sprain.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor prescribes an air cast for the right ankle. The doctor recommends ice application to the right ankle. The doctor orders crutches for weight-bearing. The doctor prescribes ibuprofen 600mg every 6 hours as needed for pain. The doctor schedules a follow-up appointment in 14 days.
